nasb.text: The hands of compassionate women Boiled their own children; They became food for them Because of the destruction of the daughter of my people.

esv.text: The hands of compassionate women have boiled their own children; they became their food during the destruction of the daughter of my people.

cnv.text: 慈心的婦人親手烹煮自己所生的孩子； 在我眾民遭毀滅的時候，孩子竟成了母親的食物。

ccb.text: 我的百姓遭毁灭时， 慈母亲手煮自己的儿女充饥。
